name: io.github.codespar/mcp-efi
description: Pix charges, boletos, carnets, Pix keys — EFI (Gerencianet) API

environment_variables.name: EFI_CLIENT_ID
environment_variables.description: OAuth2 client ID from EFI Pay

tools.name: create_cob
tools.description: Create an immediate Pix charge (cobranca imediata)

tools.name: get_cob
tools.description: Get Pix charge details by txid

tools.name: list_cobs
tools.description: List Pix charges by date range
